channel.title: How-To on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in How-To on My Linux Journey

item.title: Clean XBPS Cache on Void Linux - Free Disk Space
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to cleaning Void Linux package cache using xbps-remove commands. Covers removing all cached packages, obsolete packages, and manual cleanup.

item.title: SSH to QEMU VM - Fix Host Key Verification Error
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Simple guide to fix SSH host key verification errors when connecting to QEMU VMs. Uses ssh-keygen to remove old keys and reconnect safely.
